channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: ADP presidential candidate Aliyu Bin Abbas unveiled in Kano, pledges national renewal ahead of 2027 polls
item.description: The Action Democratic Party (ADP) presidential candidate, Ambassador Aliyu Bin Abbas, has been officially presented to his supporters in Kano State as political activities begin to gather momentum ahe...

item.title: KRA destroys illicit alcohol and contraband worth Sh218 million in Nairobi and Coast enforcement operation
item.description: The Kenya Revenue Authority (KRA), working together with other government agencies, has carried out a major enforcement operation resulting in the destruction of illicit goods valued at Sh218 million....

item.title: Switzerland face Algeria in World Cup knockout clash as Petkovic meets former team
item.description: The FIFA World Cup knockout stage match between Switzerland and Algeria got underway on July 3, 2026, marking a high-stakes Round of 32 encounter between two teams with strong tactical familiarity. Th...

item.title: Alberta pipeline proposal framed as opportunity for national unity and economic growth
item.description: In this opinion piece, Kevin Krausert, CEO and co-founder of Avatar Innovations, argues that Alberta’s submission of a proposal for a major oil pipeline to Canada’s West Coast should be viewed as a po...

item.title: Moi University declares financial distress and announces staff restructuring amid KSh 8 billion debt
item.description: Moi University in Kenya has officially acknowledged that it is technically insolvent after years of sustained financial difficulties, prompting the institution to consider major restructuring measures...

item.title: Navigating dinner party etiquette across cultures: advice on hosting and guest expectations
item.description: This Miss Manners column addresses the social challenges that can arise when cultural expectations around dinner parties differ. A reader who recently moved to the United States describes feeling anxi...

item.title: Tanzania–Mozambique trade opportunities highlighted during state visit

item.title: Cebu school increases security measures following reported shooting threat
item.description: Cebu Eastern College (CEC) has implemented heightened security measures after receiving a reported shooting threat that prompted concern among students, parents, and school personnel. The administrati...

item.title: Two police personnel martyred in militant attack on patrol in Mohmand district, KP
item.description: Two police officials were martyred when a police patrol came under a deadly attack by armed militants in the Machni area of Mohmand district in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, late Thursday night. According to po...

item.title: Spain beat Austria 3–0 to reach World Cup Round of 16
item.description: Spain show serious dominance as dem beat Austria 3–0 in a Round of 32 World Cup match held at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles. The result confirm say the European champions are still in top form as them c...

item.title: Broos urges Bafana Bafana to build on World Cup progress and target AFCON glory
item.description: Bafana Bafana head coach Hugo Broos says South Africa must use the experience gained at the 2026 FIFA World Cup as a springboard to challenge for the Africa Cup of Nations (AFCON) title. Speaking afte...

item.title: Portugal draw with Croatia in World Cup knockout tie as Ronaldo scores penalty before being substituted
item.description: Portugal and Croatia played out a tightly contested World Cup knockout match in Toronto, with both sides featuring veteran stars aiming for one last shot at international glory. Croatia took the lead ...

item.title: Extreme Heat Across U.S. Cities Raises Health Risks During July 4th Events and Crowds
item.description: The article examines how an extreme heat wave affecting major U.S. cities, particularly in the Northeast, is coinciding with July Fourth celebrations and large public events such as World Cup matches,...

item.title: Rising electricity tariffs intensify energy poverty for South African households amid widening affordability gap
item.description: Electricity price increases across South Africa are placing severe pressure on already struggling households, deepening energy poverty and forcing many families to make difficult daily choices between...

item.title: Maya Joint reflects on Wimbledon campaign after second-round exit

item.title: Montreal police investigate multiple alleged sexual assaults on metro and bus system, seek additional victims

item.description: Portugal and Croatia faced each other in a highly anticipated Round of 32 clash of the FIFA World Cup 2026 in Toronto, marking their first-ever meeting in a World Cup knockout stage. The match drew gl...

item.title: Jack Smith discusses legal concerns and political retaliation claims tied to Trump-era investigations

item.title: Russia and Ukraine escalate rhetoric after deadly Kyiv missile and drone strikes kill 25
